mapper.select: SELECT m.login_id, m.password, mt.type_name, m.nickname,m.profile_url FROM members m JOIN member_type mt ON m.member_type_id = mt.member_type_id WHERE m.login_id = #{loginId} AND m.delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT m.member_id, m.login_id, m.mobile, m.nickname, m.email, m.password, m.profile_url, m.member_type_id, m.status_id, mi.gender, mi.birth, mi.point, mi.trust_score, mi.login_ip, mi.join_ip, mi.ai_summary
FROM members m JOIN member_info mi ON m.member_id = mi.member_id
WHERE m.login_id = #{loginId} AND m.delete_yn='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET delete_yn='Y' WHERE login_id=#{loginId}
